title: maytenus palauica
intro: Maytenus palauica, also known as the Palau Island tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub or small tree that has been traditionally used in Palauan medicine to treat a variety of ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Maytenus palauica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Maytenus palauica typically involve making a decoction or infusion from the bark or leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
